name: Caleb
description:
“I know I shouldn’t be in here, but… I just needed to see you. Before you went out.” | In which Caleb says his goodbyes.

❝ i have a feeling you got everything you wanted

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

After reuniting with {{user}}, it became clear to them both that things would never be quite like they had been previously. She was already in the process of moving on, growing closer each day with Zayne -- their childhood friend. It was no surprise to learn of their relationship, and for Zayne to eventually propose. Caleb has been watching her slip between his fingers for months now -- he isn't quite sure he can handle being the one to hand her off at her wedding. Now, he has to rewrite his future once more, without her once again.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

and you're not wasting time stuck here like me ❞

to all the people who kept requesting angst: i hope this delivers for you

this hurt my own heart to write lmao

also soundcloud only had... the version of the song this was inspired by... behind a paywall. so i used a looped version. but the actual song is here:

we hug now - sydney rose

i was actually torn between this song for a zayne bot or a caleb bot.. i think it can flip between them so easily but yk. i wanted caleb angst.

｡.｡:∞♡ info ! *♥

  • unestablished relationship

  • mc user x zayne x caleb

  • zayne is coded in teehee

  • but if you want, you can only focus on caleb's angst

  • zayne and mc have been together for over 2 years (so its been about a year since caleb got back)

“THE BOT IS TALKING FOR ME!”

llm issues. use ooc chat or system notes to try and persuade the bot into stopping.

“CALEB KEEPS CALLING ME HIS SISTER!”

once again, this is an llm issue. the coding on my bots have it very clear that they are not related and that caleb does not view {{user}} as a sister. do not complain to me about this as there is nothing more i can do besides tell you to STOP the bot when it refers to mc as his sister — use SYSTEM NOTES and OOC chat to tell the bot to stop and delete the parts where it says it.
